name: should generate a query with a team stat column
description: Test case for should generate a query with a team stat column
expected_query: with "t086b742ddb9ef39dcbce33150d75e6ab" as (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as trg_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) group by "pg"."pid"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" as (select "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team", sum(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t086b742ddb9ef39dcbce33150d75e6ab"."trg_share_from_plays" AS "trg_share_from_plays_0", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t086b742ddb9ef39dcbce33150d75e6ab" on "t086b742ddb9ef39dcbce33150d75e6ab"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" on "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" group by player.fname, player.lname, "t086b742ddb9ef39dcbce33150d75e6ab"."trg_share_from_plays", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
